features.name: parameterized class typedef as module type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class containing a typedef member, accessed via scope resolution operator with empty parameterization and used as a module type parameter

features.name: specialized class typedef as interface type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a typedef struct member, specialized with type parameter, and used as an interface type parameter

features.name: class_or_package_ref as child of ref_dtype
features.description: Code should include a ClassOrPackageRef that is a child of a RefDType, where the RefDType references a typedef inside a specialized parameterized class
